summary: Full backend + frontend testing of LUXE SKIN e-commerce. All 16 pytest backend tests pass (products, config, Stripe checkout session creation w/ server-side pricing, status polling, contact, newsletter w/ consent). All 18 Playwright frontend flows pass including Home, Shop, PDP, FAQ toggle, Add-to-Cart drawer, Proceed to Checkout, Stripe redirect to checkout.stripe.com, all 4 legal pages, footer links, Contact form submit, and Newsletter consent checkbox.
action_items: Optional: Add data-testid='pdp-thumb-{i}' to PDP thumbnail images for automated gallery-switch testing (visual gallery present but no testid found, so could not assert thumb-click switching main image).
Optional: Suppress React Router v7 future-flag console warnings (cosmetic, no functional impact).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 400-line file — acceptable for current scope but consider splitting into routers/products.py, routers/checkout.py, services/email.py as the catalog grows.
Server-side pricing in _compute_order is correctly authoritative: client-supplied price/amount fields are ignored — verified by test_checkout_ignores_client_price.
_finalize_order uses an atomic claim via update_one with $ne filter to prevent duplicate orders/emails — good idempotency pattern.
MongoDB _id is properly excluded via projection in checkout_status — good.
Stripe webhook signature verification is enforced (400 on failure) — good.
CORS allows all origins (*) — acceptable for demo, but production should restrict CORS_ORIGINS to the deployed frontend domain.
RESEND_API_KEY empty is handled gracefully (log + skip) — not a bug per request brief.
test_credentials: None required (no auth). Stripe test key sk_test_emergent pre-configured.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed contact submission and newsletter subscribers, plus 3 Stripe pending checkout sessions in payment_transactions collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows working end-to-end. Backend has 16 pytest cases at /app/backend/tests/test_luxe_skin_api.py covering products/config/checkout/contact/newsletter. Frontend Playwright covers full purchase funnel from Home -> PDP -> Cart -> Checkout -> Stripe redirect (confirmed lands on checkout.stripe.com). Note: actual paid-flow finalization (orders collection insert + email) was not exercised because completing Stripe payment requires interactive card entry; this code path is unit-protected by atomic claim and looks correct.
